sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58726" key="kolu/bdaina" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολύβδαινα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, kind of <sense id="n58726.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crab</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
